reviews.review_title: Awesome game, getting the full game soon
reviews.review_description: This game is a absolute gem for free, gives you multiplayer and awesome tennis practice. Can't wait for the full version.
It was weary good
Unfortunately, this just didn't hit the mark with me as a competitive tennis player. The physics seemed very off and it got frustrating very quickly.
I love it so  much

Updated: Developer responded and pointed me to change to Simulation physics which are really good. Updating to 5-stars.

Graphics are good but I'd rather watch a movie. Game play should flow well and physics should be precise for me to be able to swing the arms and land the shots precisely. Its just not there. First Person Tennis is superior to this game.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you didn't appreciate our demo! Have you tried enabling the Simulation controls from the menu? Perhaps you'll find them more appropriate to your taste!

reviews.review_description: fun game with realistic physics

I need this game. Is more better than the other tennis game in Meta Store. I love your game but is only a demo. When? I hate play again and again exhibition. I want more places, players and a carreer mode. For me is the best tennis game

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your kind words! The full game will be released this spring, make sure to follow our channels to not miss any info!

reviews.review_description: I think people will have so much fun playing this game once its released. I predict fast and furious tennus games and a great work out plus extras. hopefully the dev will add autorun but as a tennis game its different but i like it 👍

developer_response.body: Many thanks for your positive review, it helps a lot!

reviews.review_description: When can I purchase the full-version!?!?! Very well done, the demo is too short.. even a full game would suffice ;)

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We are working to bring the full version to the Quest Store early next year!

reviews.review_description: Finally a good tennis VR game!!!!!

reviews.review_title: This is a Great Sport Game!
reviews.review_description:
This is the kind of Sport Game you hope to find in the VR experience! I’ll purchase this just as soon as it’s released, (so hey Dev’s get it worked out fellas and throw a release party already…) another idea for a game would be Competitive Horseshoes! NASCAR, Competition Archery, or how about a serious survival/Wilderness Bear Grylls type of game where you face real serious challenges…(just a thought) at any rate the Tennis Game is a huge hit with me anyway…Thanks Dev’s! Keep up the Great work!
Respectfully Yours,
Stephen Jeffries, Cleveland Oh.
Very real but unable to move freely, it would be even better if you can move with the joystick

great game when you hit  the ball it has no control , the slice in the game is good I also like how the game helps you hit with topspin the quality on the game is good as well mostly the ground strokes need some work,but can wait till the full game comes out

developer_response.body: hi WDraxy, thank you for your feedback! Full version will be even better 💪

reviews.review_description: Great surprise! This game has a good graphic  and easy to learn gameplay. Ok, there are some improvements that can be done (e.g. better physics of the ball and opponent AI...) But this is just a demo therefore there is still time to reach the perfection .. overall it's a very good game for gamers who love tennis . I'm sure when multiplayer will be live there will be a lot of fun!!!!! Well done!!!!! Can't wait to play Tennis League VR!!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review! Counting to see you on the court!

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: WOW! Bumping this from three stars to five! What an update. Everything that I had a problem with before has been fixed and this is now a stellar tennis game. For the first time, I was able to pass the time trials on forehand and backhand. Strokes are accurate and require the appropriate force. No more whaling on a shot to see it barely clear the net or conversely, end up in the trees. Everything feels natural.

Love the teleportation system. I thought it would be tricky, but I quickly got the hang of it and I don't see it being a problem at all. Ditto with the serving mechanism. Feels very smooth, if a tad overpowered. I dared to play the exhibition game and I enjoyed it far more than I expected to. It was fun!

I like the new indoor arena, too. Great job, devs! Best tennis game on Oculus by far!

previous review:
I'm very excited about this title and will likely purchase upon release. For now, it's a bit too tricky for me to enjoy for a few reasons:

-as others have mentioned, force of strokes is off. It's a killer workout right now, haha, but it shouldn't be this difficult to clear the net
-during the ball machine practice, the machine sends balls to forehand and backhand at an uneven rate, like for every one forehand, it gives you six backhands. 
-balls are too high! I'm 5'8", so not short, but during the machine practice, most of the balls bounce over my head. And volley practice is unusable. I have to reach way above my head to hit any of the balls. Some I even have to jump for. Like I said, I'm not short, so this would be completely unusable for anyone shorter than me, which would be a lot of people. Is there a way to adjust height settings?

I'm sure these will be fixed in time. I'm still mostly positive about this game. I really enjoy the setting. I feel like I'm outside. It's sunny. I hear the traffic. It's very relaxing for me, so I'm eager to play the perfected version when it's ready!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, we are happy to see the update made your experience better 💪

reviews.review_description: On my opinion this is the best tennis implementation in store/lab for now! I tried other alternatives and found them unplayable. This particular product has better design and physics!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words!

reviews.review_description: Literally

developer_response.body: Hi, we are sorry to hear you are not enjoying Tennis League VR, could you please provide additional feedback on what made your experience so terrible?

reviews.review_description: I very like the game but the New versión, the online i locked

developer_response.body: hi masacuaneitor, we have removed the multiplayer from the new demo as the previous version presented many issues due to server limitations that limited the maximum capacity of simultaneously online players, resulting in frustration from users who attempted to play at the same time. We will restore full multiplayer functionalities with the full version of the game.

reviews.review_description: the game does have potential to be great but still needs alot of work on movement and physics was almost unplayable

developer_response.body: Hey there, we have recently updated the demo and we believe our recent update solves the physics issue you mentioned! Would you consider giving it another shot?

reviews.review_description: This is so fun , when can we play multi player or career !?

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your positive review! The full game will hit Meta Store in Q2 2023 with full multiplayer and career features!
